name: Not Reported Projects
dataset_query:
{"database":4,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"weris_project_activity","query":"SELECT
  wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND wp.primary_key NOT IN (
    SELECT
      wpa.project_id
    FROM
      public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
    WHERE
      wpa.activity_updated_at >= (
        DATE_TRUNC('week', (NOW() + INTERVAL '-1 week') + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day'
      )
      AND wpa.activity_updated_at < (
        DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW() + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day'
      )
  )
ORDER BY
  wp.project_name DESC
LIMIT 1048575;
"}}

name: Reported Projects This Week
dataset_query:
{"database":4,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"weris_project_activity","query":"SELECT
  DISTINCT wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
JOIN
  public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
  ON wp.primary_key = wpa.project_id
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND wpa.activity_updated_at >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
  AND wpa.activity_updated_at < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY
  wp.project_name DESC
LIMIT 1048575;
"}}

name: Channel Comments Analysis - sql
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"api_result","query":"SELECT
  "public"."api_result"."id" AS "id",
  "public"."api_result"."text" AS "text",
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  "public"."api_result"."query_id" AS "query_id",
  "public"."api_result"."created_date" AS "created_date",
  "public"."api_result"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
  "public"."api_result"."video_id" AS "video_id",
  "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel__title"
  -- Optionally, aggregate comment information:
  -- , COUNT("Youtube Automation Videocomments - Query"."id") AS "NumberOfComments"
FROM
  "public"."api_result"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_videocomments" AS "Youtube Automation Videocomments - Query" ON "public"."api_result"."query_id" = "Youtube Automation Videocomments - Query"."query_id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_analysedvideos" AS "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video" ON "public"."api_result"."video_id" = "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_monitoredchannels" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel" ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."channel_id" = "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."id"
WHERE
  (
    "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" IS NOT NULL
  )
  AND (
    (
      "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" <> ''
    )
    OR (
      "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" IS NULL
    )
  )
  AND (
    "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" = 'Millard Ayo'
  )
GROUP BY
  "public"."api_result"."id",
  "public"."api_result"."text",
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment",
  "public"."api_result"."query_id",
  "public"."api_result"."created_date",
  "public"."api_result"."is_synced",
  "public"."api_result"."video_id",
  "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel__title"
LIMIT 1048575;"}}

name: Overall Comments Sentiment Analysis - Modified
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"api_result","query":"SELECT
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  count(DISTINCT "public"."api_result"."id") AS "count"
FROM
  "public"."api_result"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_analysedvideos" AS "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"
    ON "public"."api_result"."video_id" = "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_videocomments" AS "Youtube Automation Videocomments"
    ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id" = "Youtube Automation Videocomments"."video_id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_monitoredchannels" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"
    ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."channel_id" = "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."id"
WHERE
  (
    "public"."api_result"."sentiment" <> 'Language detection failed.'
    OR "public"."api_result"."sentiment" IS NULL
  )
  AND (
    "public"."api_result"."sentiment" <> 'Language not supported.'
    OR "public"."api_result"."sentiment" IS NULL
  )
GROUP BY
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment"
ORDER BY
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment" ASC;"}}

name: Not Reported Projects
dataset_query:
{"database":4,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"Not Reported Projects This Week","query":"SELECT
  count(
    distinct "Weris Projects - project_name"."unique_id"
  ) AS "count"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      wp.project_name AS "project_name"
    FROM
      public.weris_projects AS wp
    WHERE
      wp.is_active = TRUE
      AND wp.primary_key NOT IN (
        SELECT
          wpa.project_id
        FROM
          public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
        WHERE
          -- Activity overlaps current week (start or end falls within the week)
          (
            wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
            AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
          )
      )
    ORDER BY
      wp.project_name DESC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_projects" AS "Weris Projects - project_name"
  ON "source"."project_name" = "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_name"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_project_activity" AS "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_project_technologies" AS "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_technologies" AS "Weris Technologies - Technology"
  ON "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."technology_id" = "Weris Technologies - Technology"."primary_key"
WHERE
  (
    "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_status" <> 'ON_HOLD'
    OR "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_status" IS NULL
  )
"}}

name: Reported Projects
dataset_query:
{"database":4,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"Reported Projects This Week","query":"SELECT
  count(distinct "source"."project_name") AS "count"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      DISTINCT wp.project_name AS "project_name"
    FROM
      public.weris_projects AS wp
      JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS wpa 
        ON wp.primary_key = wpa.project_id
    WHERE
      wp.is_active = TRUE
      AND (
        wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
        AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
      )
    ORDER BY
      wp.project_name DESC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_projects AS "Weris Projects - project_name"
  ON "source"."project_name" = "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_name"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_project_technologies AS "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_technologies AS "Weris Technologies - Technology"
  ON "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."technology_id" = "Weris Technologies - Technology"."primary_key"

name: Reported Projects
dataset_query:
{"database":4,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"Reported Projects","query":"SELECT
  DISTINCT wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
  JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS wpa 
    ON wp.primary_key = wpa.project_id
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND (
    wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
  )
ORDER BY
  wp.project_name DESC
LIMIT
  1048575
"}}

name: Not Reported Projects
dataset_query:
{"database":4,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"collection":"Not Reported Projects This Week","query":"SELECT
  DISTINCT "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_name"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      wp.project_name AS "project_name"
    FROM
      public.weris_projects AS wp
    WHERE
      wp.is_active = TRUE
      AND wp.primary_key NOT IN (
        SELECT
          wpa.project_id
        FROM
          public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
        WHERE
          wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
          AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
      )
    ORDER BY
      wp.project_name DESC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_projects AS "Weris Projects - project_name"
  ON "source"."project_name" = "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_name"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_project_technologies AS "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_technologies AS "Weris Technologies - Technology"
  ON "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."technology_id" = "Weris Technologies - Technology"."primary_key"
WHERE
  (
    "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_status" <> 'ON_HOLD'
    OR "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_status" IS NULL
  )
"}}

  CASE
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN '41-50'
    WHEN "source"."age" >= 51 THEN '51+'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS "age_group",

  COUNT(DISTINCT "source"."_mb_row_id") AS "count"

name: Automated Loan Infomation
dataset_query:
{"database":5,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  source.name AS name,
  FLOOR(source.final_loan / 750000.0) * 750000.0 AS final_loan,
  COALESCE(loan_repayment.loan_repayment, 0) AS loan_repayment,
  source.final_loan - COALESCE(loan_repayment.loan_repayment, 0) AS "Remained Loan"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      name,
      SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
      SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
    FROM
      public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE
      type = 'Emergency Loan'
      OR type = 'Development Loan'
    GROUP BY
      name
    ORDER BY
      name ASC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS source
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
            AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
            AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
            AND (
              (t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA' AND t.amount = 200000)
              OR (t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI' AND t.amount = 250000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA' AND t.amount = 30000)
              OR (t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA' AND t.amount = 10000)
              OR (t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI' AND t.amount = 36000)
              OR (t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI' AND t.amount = 15000)
              OR (t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO' AND t.amount = 20000)
            ) THEN t.amount
          WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount
          ELSE 0
        END
      ) AS loan_repayment
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date) name,
          amount,
          type,
          date
        FROM
          public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
        WHERE
          type IN (
            'App loan repayment',
            'App loan repayment on behalf',
            'Loan Payment',
            'Loan Payment other member',
            'Other Member Penalty Payment',
            'Penalty Payment'
          )
      ) t
    GROUP BY
      t.name
    ORDER BY
      t.name ASC
  ) AS loan_repayment
ON source.name = loan_repayment.name
GROUP BY
  source.name,
  source.final_loan,
  loan_repayment.loan_repayment
ORDER BY
  source.name ASC,
  FLOOR(source.final_loan / 750000.0) * 750000.0 ASC
LIMIT 1048575"}}

          'Other Member Penalty Payment',
          'Penalty Payment'
        )
      ) t
      GROUP BY t.name
      ORDER BY t.name ASC
    ) AS "source"
    LEFT JOIN (
      SELECT
        name,
        SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
        SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
      FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
      WHERE type = 'Emergency Loan'
         OR type = 'Development Loan'
      GROUP BY name
      ORDER BY name ASC
      LIMIT 1048575
    ) AS "Total_Loan_name" ON "source"."name" = "Total_Loan_name"."name"
    LIMIT 1048575
  ) AS "source"
  LIMIT 1048575
) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    name,
    SUM(amount) AS total_amount
  FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
  WHERE type IN (
    'App share',
    'App share on behalf',
    'Buy share other network',
    'Buy shares',
    'initiate share price change'
  )
  GROUP BY name
  ORDER BY name ASC
) AS "Share_name" ON "source"."name" = "Share_name"."name"
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS sum_total_amount
  FROM (
    SELECT name, SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE type IN (
      'App share',
      'App share on behalf',
      'Buy share other network',
      'Buy shares',
      'initiate share price change'
    )
    GROUP BY name
  ) a
) share_totals
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT SUM(ten_percent) AS sum_ten_percent
  FROM (
    SELECT SUM(amount) * 0.10 AS ten_percent
    FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE type = 'Emergency Loan'
       OR type = 'Development Loan'
    GROUP BY name
  ) b
) loan_ten_percent
LIMIT 1048575"}}

dataset_query:
{"database":5,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  "source"."name" AS "name",
  "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
  "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
  "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
  "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
  "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
  "source"."Share - name__total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
  "source"."Distributed(Gawio)" AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "source"."name" AS "name",
      "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
      "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
      "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
      "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
      "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
      "Share_name"."total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
      CASE
        WHEN "source"."Total Loan" >= 2000000 THEN "Share_name"."total_amount" / share_totals.sum_total_amount * loan_ten_percent.sum_ten_percent
        ELSE 0
      END AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          "source"."name" AS "name",
          "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
          "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
          "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
          "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
          CASE
            WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" < 100000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 1
            WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" <= 660000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 3
            WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" >= 670000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 6
            ELSE NULL
          END AS "monthly repayment"
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              "source"."name" AS "name",
              "source"."sum" AS "Total Repayment",
              "Total_Loan_name"."total_loan" AS "Total Loan",
              "Total_Loan_name"."final_loan" AS "Final_Loan",
              ("Total_Loan_name"."final_loan" - "source"."sum") AS "Remained LRoan"
            FROM
              (
                SELECT
                  t.name,
                  SUM(
                    CASE
                      WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
                     
   AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
                      AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
                      AND (
                        (
                          t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA'
                          AND t.amount = 20000
                        )
                       
    OR (
                          t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE'
                          AND t.amount = 20000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA'
                          AND t.amount = 200000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI'
                          AND t.amount = 250000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA'
                          AND t.amount = 30000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA'
                          AND t.amount = 10000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI'
                          AND t.amount = 36000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA'
                          AND t.amount = 20000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI'
                          AND t.amount = 15000
                        )
                        OR (
                          t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO'
                          AND t.amount = 20000
                        )
                      ) THEN t.amount
                      WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount
                      ELSE 0
                    END
                  ) AS sum
                FROM
                  (
                    SELECT
                      DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date) name,
                      amount,
                      type,
                      date
                    FROM
                      public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
                   
WHERE
                      type IN (
                        'App loan repayment',
                        'App loan repayment on behalf',
                        'Loan Payment',
                        'Loan Payment other member',
                        'Other Member Penalty Payment',
                        'Penalty Payment'
                      )
                  ) t
               
GROUP BY
                  t.name
               
ORDER BY
                  t.name ASC
              ) AS "source"
             
LEFT JOIN (
                SELECT
                  name,
                  SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
                  SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
                FROM
                  public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
                WHERE
                  type = 'Emergency Loan'
                  OR type = 'Development Loan'
                GROUP BY
                  name
                ORDER BY
                  name ASC
               
LIMIT
                  1048575
              ) AS "Total_Loan_name" ON "source"."name" = "Total_Loan_name"."name"
            LIMIT
              1048575
          ) AS "source"
        LIMIT
          1048575
      ) AS "source"
      LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
          name,
          SUM(amount) AS total_amount
        FROM
          public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
        WHERE
          type IN (
            'App share',
            'App share on behalf',
            'Buy share other network',
            'Buy shares',
            'initiate share price change'
          )
        GROUP BY
          name
        ORDER BY
          name ASC
      ) AS "Share_name" ON "source"."name" = "Share_name"."name"
      CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
          SUM(total_amount) AS sum_total_amount
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              name,
              SUM(amount) AS total_amount
            FROM
              public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
            WHERE
              type IN (
                'App share',
                'App share on behalf',
                'Buy share other network',
                'Buy shares',
                'initiate share price change'
              )
            GROUP BY
              name
          ) a
      ) share_totals
      CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
          SUM(ten_percent) AS sum_ten_percent
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              SUM(amount) * 0.10 AS ten_percent
            FROM
              public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
            WHERE
              type = 'Emergency Loan'
              OR type = 'Development Loan'
            GROUP BY
              name
          ) b
      ) loan_ten_percent
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT
  1048575"}}

{"database":5,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  name,
  SUM(amount) AS sum_amount

  (
    SELECT
      name,
      SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN amount = 55000 THEN 5000 
          WHEN amount = 105000 THEN 5000
		  WHEN amount = 110000 THEN 10000
		  WHEN amount = 100000 THEN 0
		  WHEN amount = 60000  THEN 0
          WHEN amount = 50000 THEN 0
          ELSE amount
        END
      ) AS amount,
      DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS month
    FROM
      public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE
      type IN (
        'App Pay socialfund',
        'App social fund contribution on behalf',
        'Social Fund',
        'Social Fund other member'
      )
    GROUP BY
      name,
      DATE_TRUNC('month', date)
  ) AS monthly_name_amounts
GROUP BY
  name
ORDER BY
  name ASC;"}}

name: Mikopo2
dataset_query:
{"database":5,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  "source"."name" AS "name",
  "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
  "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
  "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
  "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
  "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
  "source"."Share - name__total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
  "source"."Distributed(Gawio)" AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "source"."name" AS "name",
      "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
      "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
      "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
      "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
      "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
      "source"."Share - name__total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
      "source"."Distributed(Gawio)" AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          "source"."name" AS "name",
          "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
          "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
          "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
          "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
          "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
          "Share_name"."total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
          CASE
            WHEN "source"."Total Loan" >= 2000000 THEN "Share_name"."total_amount" / share_totals.sum_total_amount * loan_ten_percent.sum_ten_percent
            ELSE 0
          END AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              "source"."name" AS "name",
              "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
              "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
              "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
              "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
              CASE
                WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" < 100000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 1
                WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" <= 660000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 3
                WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" >= 670000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 6
                ELSE NULL
              END AS "monthly repayment"
            FROM
              (
                SELECT
                  "source"."name" AS "name",
                  "source"."sum" AS "Total Repayment",
                  "Total_Loan_name"."total_loan" AS "Total Loan",
                  "Total_Loan_name"."final_loan" AS "Final_Loan",
                  ("Total_Loan_name"."final_loan" - "source"."sum") AS "Remained LRoan"
                FROM
                  (
                    SELECT
                      t.name,
                      SUM(
                        CASE
                          WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
                         
   AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
                          AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
                          AND (
                            (
                              t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA'
                              AND t.amount = 20000
                            )
                           
    OR (
                              t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE'
                              AND t.amount = 20000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA'
                              AND t.amount = 200000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI'
                              AND t.amount = 250000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA'
                              AND t.amount = 30000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA'
                              AND t.amount = 10000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI'
                              AND t.amount = 36000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA'
                              AND t.amount = 20000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI'
                              AND t.amount = 15000
                            )
                            OR (
                              t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO'
                              AND t.amount = 20000
                            )
                          ) THEN t.amount
                          WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount
                          ELSE 0
                        END
                      ) AS sum
                    FROM
                      (
                        SELECT
                          DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date) name,
                          amount,
                          type,
                          date
                        FROM
                          public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
                       
WHERE
                          type IN (
                            'App loan repayment',
                            'App loan repayment on behalf',
                            'Loan Payment',
                            'Loan Payment other member',
                            'Other Member Penalty Payment',
                            'Penalty Payment'
                          )
                      ) t
                   
GROUP BY
                      t.name
                   
ORDER BY
                      t.name ASC
                  ) AS "source"
                 
LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT
                      name,
                      SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
                      SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
                    FROM
                      public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
                    WHERE
                      type = 'Emergency Loan'
                      OR type = 'Development Loan'
                    GROUP BY
                      name
                    ORDER BY
                      name ASC
                   
LIMIT
                      1048575
                  ) AS "Total_Loan_name" ON "source"."name" = "Total_Loan_name"."name"
                LIMIT
                  1048575
              ) AS "source"
            LIMIT
              1048575
          ) AS "source"
          LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT
              name,
              SUM(amount) AS total_amount
            FROM
              public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
            WHERE
              type IN (
                'App share',
                'App share on behalf',
                'Buy share other network',
                'Buy shares',
                'initiate share price change'
              )
            GROUP BY
              name
            ORDER BY
              name ASC
          ) AS "Share_name" ON "source"."name" = "Share_name"."name"
          CROSS JOIN (
            SELECT
              SUM(total_amount) AS sum_total_amount
            FROM
              (
                SELECT
                  name,
                  SUM(amount) AS total_amount
                FROM
                  public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
                WHERE
                  type IN (
                    'App share',
                    'App share on behalf',
                    'Buy share other network',
                    'Buy shares',
                    'initiate share price change'
                  )
                GROUP BY
                  name
              ) a
          ) share_totals
          CROSS JOIN (
            SELECT
              SUM(ten_percent) AS sum_ten_percent
            FROM
              (
                SELECT
                  SUM(amount) * 0.10 AS ten_percent
                FROM
                  public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
                WHERE
                  type = 'Emergency Loan'
                  OR type = 'Development Loan'
                GROUP BY
                  name
              ) b
          ) loan_ten_percent
        LIMIT
          1048575
      ) AS "source"
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT
  1048575"}}

name: Frequente sentence
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"WITH sentence_frequencies AS (
    SELECT LOWER(ar.text) AS sentence, COUNT(*) AS frequency
    FROM public.api_result ar
    LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
    WHERE ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28' 
    AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
    AND LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%samia%'
    AND ar.text <> ''
    GROUP BY LOWER(ar.text)
)
SELECT 
    aq.id AS api_query_id,
    aq.link,
    aq.source,
    aq.client,
    aq.queried_time,
    aq.video_title,
    aq.channel_id,
    aq.is_queried,
    aq.created_by_id AS api_query_created_by_id,
    aq.percentage_completion,
    aq.processing_status,
    aq.is_active AS api_query_is_active,
    aq.instagram_topic_monitored_id,
    ar.id AS api_result_id,
    ar.text AS api_result_text,
    ar.sentiment,
    ar.query_id,
    ar.created_date,
    ar.is_synced,
    ar.video_id,
    ar.created_by_id AS api_result_created_by_id,
    ar.is_active AS api_result_is_active,
    sf.sentence,
    sf.frequency
FROM public.api_result ar
LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
JOIN sentence_frequencies sf ON LOWER(ar.text) = sf.sentence
WHERE ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28' 
AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
AND LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%samia%'
AND ar.text <> ''
ORDER BY sf.frequency DESC, ar.id;"}}

name: Frequente comments
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  "source"."api_query_id" AS "api_query_id",
  "source"."link" AS "link",
  "source"."source" AS "source",
  "source"."client" AS "client",
  "source"."queried_time" AS "queried_time",
  "source"."video_title" AS "video_title",
  "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
  "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
  "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
  "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
  "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
  "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
  "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
  "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
  "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
  "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
  "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
  "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
  "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
  "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
  "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
  "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
  "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
FROM
  (
    WITH sentence_frequencies AS (
      SELECT
        LOWER(ar.text) AS sentence,
        COUNT(*) AS frequency
      FROM
        public.api_result ar
       
LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
     
WHERE
        ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
       
   AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
        AND LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%kampeni%'
        AND ar.text <> ''
     
GROUP BY
        LOWER(ar.text)
    )
    SELECT
      aq.id AS api_query_id,
      aq.link,
      aq.source,
      aq.client,
      aq.queried_time,
      aq.video_title,
      aq.channel_id,
      aq.is_queried,
      aq.created_by_id AS api_query_created_by_id,
      aq.percentage_completion,
      aq.processing_status,
      aq.is_active AS api_query_is_active,
      aq.instagram_topic_monitored_id,
      ar.id AS api_result_id,
      ar.text AS api_result_text,
      ar.sentiment,
      ar.query_id,
      ar.created_date,
      ar.is_synced,
      ar.video_id,
      ar.created_by_id AS api_result_created_by_id,
      ar.is_active AS api_result_is_active,
      sf.sentence,
      sf.frequency
    FROM
      public.api_result ar
      LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
      JOIN sentence_frequencies sf ON LOWER(ar.text) = sf.sentence
    WHERE
      ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
      AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
      AND LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%kampeni%'
      AND ar.text <> ''
   
ORDER BY
      sf.frequency DESC,
      ar.id
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT
  1048575"}}

name: Upinzani Comments
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
"public"."api_result".*
FROM "public"."api_result"
LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_analysedvideos" AS "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video" 
  ON "public"."api_result"."video_id" = "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_videocomments" AS "Youtube Automation Videocomments" 
  ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id" = "Youtube Automation Videocomments"."video_id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_monitoredchannels" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel" 
  ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."channel_id" = "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."api_query" AS "Api Query - Query" 
  ON "public"."api_result"."query_id" = "Api Query - Query"."id"
WHERE
  (
    ("public"."api_result"."sentiment" = 'negative')
    OR ("public"."api_result"."sentiment" = 'neutral')
    OR ("public"."api_result"."sentiment" = 'positive')
  )
  AND (
    "Api Query - Query"."queried_time" >= timestamp with time zone '2025-08-28 00:00:00.000 +03:00'
  )
  AND (
    "Api Query - Query"."queried_time" < timestamp with time zone '2026-01-01 00:00:00.000 +03:00'
  )
  AND (
    LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%act%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%wazalendo%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%act-wazalendo%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%chauma%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%ccm%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%chadema%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%cuf%'
    OR LOWER("Api Query - Query"."video_title") LIKE '%ukawa%'
  );"}}

name: Frequente comments_CCM
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  "source"."api_query_id" AS "api_query_id",
  "source"."link" AS "link",
  "source"."source" AS "source",
  "source"."client" AS "client",
  "source"."queried_time" AS "queried_time",
  "source"."video_title" AS "video_title",
  "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
  "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
  "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
  "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
  "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
  "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
  "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
  "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
  "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
  "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
  "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
  "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
  "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
  "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
  "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
  "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
  "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "source"."api_query_id" AS "api_query_id",
      "source"."link" AS "link",
      "source"."source" AS "source",
      "source"."client" AS "client",
      "source"."queried_time" AS "queried_time",
      "source"."video_title" AS "video_title",
      "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
      "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
      "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
      "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
      "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
      "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
      "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
      "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
      "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
      "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
      "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
      "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
      "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
      "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
      "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
      "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
      "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
      "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
    FROM
      (
        WITH sentence_frequencies AS (
          SELECT
            LOWER(ar.text) AS sentence,
            COUNT(*) AS frequency
          FROM
            public.api_result ar
           
LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
         
WHERE
            ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
           
   AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
            AND LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%ccm%'
            AND ar.text <> ''
         
GROUP BY
            LOWER(ar.text)
        )
        SELECT
          aq.id AS api_query_id,
          aq.link,
          aq.source,
          aq.client,
          aq.queried_time,
          aq.video_title,
          aq.channel_id,
          aq.is_queried,
          aq.created_by_id AS api_query_created_by_id,
          aq.percentage_completion,
          aq.processing_status,
          aq.is_active AS api_query_is_active,
          aq.instagram_topic_monitored_id,
          ar.id AS api_result_id,
          ar.text AS api_result_text,
          ar.sentiment,
          ar.query_id,
          ar.created_date,
          ar.is_synced,
          ar.video_id,
          ar.created_by_id AS api_result_created_by_id,
          ar.is_active AS api_result_is_active,
          sf.sentence,
          sf.frequency
        FROM
          public.api_result ar
          LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
          JOIN sentence_frequencies sf ON LOWER(ar.text) = sf.sentence
        WHERE
          ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
          AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
          AND LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%ccm%'
          AND ar.text <> ''
       
ORDER BY
          sf.frequency DESC,
          ar.id
      ) AS "source"
   
LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT
  1048575"}}

name: FREQUENT_COMMENTS_UPZ
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"SELECT
  "source"."api_query_id" AS "api_query_id",
  "source"."link" AS "link",
  "source"."source" AS "source",
  "source"."client" AS "client",
  "source"."queried_time" AS "queried_time",
  "source"."video_title" AS "video_title",
  "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
  "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
  "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
  "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
  "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
  "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
  "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
  "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
  "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
  "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
  "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
  "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
  "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
  "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
  "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
  "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
  "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
FROM
  (
    WITH sentence_frequencies AS (
      SELECT
        LOWER(ar.text) AS sentence,
        COUNT(*) AS frequency
      FROM
        public.api_result ar
      LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
      WHERE
        ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
        AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
        AND (
          LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%act%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%wazalendo%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%act-wazalendo%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%chauma%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%ccm%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%chadema%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%cuf%'
          OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%ukawa%'
        )
        AND ar.text <> ''
      GROUP BY
        LOWER(ar.text)
    )
    SELECT
      aq.id AS api_query_id,
      aq.link,
      aq.source,
      aq.client,
      aq.queried_time,
      aq.video_title,
      aq.channel_id,
      aq.is_queried,
      aq.created_by_id AS api_query_created_by_id,
      aq.percentage_completion,
      aq.processing_status,
      aq.is_active AS api_query_is_active,
      aq.instagram_topic_monitored_id,
      ar.id AS api_result_id,
      ar.text AS api_result_text,
      ar.sentiment,
      ar.query_id,
      ar.created_date,
      ar.is_synced,
      ar.video_id,
      ar.created_by_id AS api_result_created_by_id,
      ar.is_active AS api_result_is_active,
      sf.sentence,
      sf.frequency
    FROM
      public.api_result ar
      LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
      JOIN sentence_frequencies sf ON LOWER(ar.text) = sf.sentence
    WHERE
      ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
      AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
      AND (
        LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%kampeni%'
        OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%samia%'
      )
      AND ar.text <> ''
    ORDER BY
      sf.frequency DESC,
      ar.id
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT 1048575;"}}

      "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
      "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
      "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
      "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
      "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
      "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
      "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
      "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
      "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
      "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
      "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
      "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
      "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
      "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
      "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
      "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
      "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
      "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          "source"."api_query_id" AS "api_query_id",
          "source"."link" AS "link",
          "source"."source" AS "source",
          "source"."client" AS "client",
          "source"."queried_time" AS "queried_time",
          "source"."video_title" AS "video_title",
          "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
          "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
          "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
          "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
          "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
          "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
          "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
          "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
          "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
          "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
          "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
          "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
          "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
          "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
          "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
          "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
          "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
          "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
        FROM
          (
            WITH sentence_frequencies AS (
              SELECT
                LOWER(ar.text) AS sentence,
                COUNT(*) AS frequency
              FROM
                public.api_result ar
               
LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
             
WHERE
                ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
               
   AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
                AND (
                  LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%act%'
                 
    OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%wazalendo%'
                  OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%act-wazalendo%'
                  OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%chauma%'
                  OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%chadema%'
                  OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%cuf%'
                  OR LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%ukawa%'
                )
                AND ar.text <> ''
             
GROUP BY
                LOWER(ar.text)
            )
            SELECT
              aq.id AS api_query_id,
              aq.link,
              aq.source,
              aq.client,
              aq.queried_time,
              aq.video_title,
              aq.channel_id,
              aq.is_queried,
              aq.created_by_id AS api_query_created_by_id,
              aq.percentage_completion,
              aq.processing_status,
              aq.is_active AS api_query_is_active,
              aq.instagram_topic_monitored_id,
              ar.id AS api_result_id,
              ar.text AS api_result_text,
              ar.sentiment,
              ar.query_id,
              ar.created_date,
              ar.is_synced,
              ar.video_id,
              ar.created_by_id AS api_result_created_by_id,
              ar.is_active AS api_result_is_active,
              sf.sentence,
              sf.frequency
            FROM
              public.api_result ar
              LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
              JOIN sentence_frequencies sf ON LOWER(ar.text) = sf.sentence
            WHERE
              ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
              AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
              AND ar.text <> ''
           
ORDER BY
              sf.frequency DESC,
              ar.id
          ) AS "source"
       
LIMIT
          1048575
      ) AS "source"
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT
  1048575"}}

name: Upinzani Frequent
dataset_query:
{"database":7,"type":"native","native":{"template-tags":{},"query":"WITH sentence_frequencies AS (
                  SELECT
                    LOWER(ar.text) AS sentence,
                    COUNT(*) AS frequency
                  FROM
                    public.api_result ar
                   
LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
                 
WHERE
                    ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
                   
   AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
AND (
                        LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%cuf%'
    OR
                        LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%chauma%'
    OR 
                        LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%act%'
    OR 
                        LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%act-wazalendo%'
    OR 
                        LOWER(aq.video_title) LIKE '%chadema%'
  )
                    AND ar.text <> ''
                 
GROUP BY
                    LOWER(ar.text)
                )
SELECT
  "source"."api_query_id" AS "api_query_id",
  "source"."link" AS "link",
  "source"."source" AS "source",
  "source"."client" AS "client",
  "source"."queried_time" AS "queried_time",
  "source"."video_title" AS "video_title",
  "source"."channel_id" AS "channel_id",
  "source"."is_queried" AS "is_queried",
  "source"."api_query_created_by_id" AS "api_query_created_by_id",
  "source"."percentage_completion" AS "percentage_completion",
  "source"."processing_status" AS "processing_status",
  "source"."api_query_is_active" AS "api_query_is_active",
  "source"."instagram_topic_monitored_id" AS "instagram_topic_monitored_id",
  "source"."api_result_id" AS "api_result_id",
  "source"."api_result_text" AS "api_result_text",
  "source"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  "source"."query_id" AS "query_id",
  "source"."created_date" AS "created_date",
  "source"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
  "source"."video_id" AS "video_id",
  "source"."api_result_created_by_id" AS "api_result_created_by_id",
  "source"."api_result_is_active" AS "api_result_is_active",
  "source"."sentence" AS "sentence",
  "source"."frequency" AS "frequency"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      aq.id AS api_query_id,
      aq.link,
      aq.source,
      aq.client,
      aq.queried_time,
      aq.video_title,
      aq.channel_id,
      aq.is_queried,
      aq.created_by_id AS api_query_created_by_id,
      aq.percentage_completion,
      aq.processing_status,
      aq.is_active AS api_query_is_active,
      aq.instagram_topic_monitored_id,
      ar.id AS api_result_id,
      ar.text AS api_result_text,
      ar.sentiment,
      ar.query_id,
      ar.created_date,
      ar.is_synced,
      ar.video_id,
      ar.created_by_id AS api_result_created_by_id,
      ar.is_active AS api_result_is_active,
      sf.sentence,
      sf.frequency
    FROM
      public.api_result ar
      LEFT JOIN public.api_query aq ON aq.id = ar.query_id
      JOIN sentence_frequencies sf ON LOWER(ar.text) = sf.sentence
    WHERE
      ar.created_date >= '2025-08-28'
      AND ar.created_date <= '2025-12-31'
      AND ar.text <> ''
   
ORDER BY
      sf.frequency DESC,
      ar.id
   ) AS "source"
  
LIMIT 1048575;"}}
